member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability
member.summary:
Declarative capability flags that govern what an agent is allowed to do. Capabilities are granted per and enforced at runtime before any sensitive operation executes.
This is the foundation of MonadicSharp.Agents' capability-based security model: agents must declare their and the orchestrator verifies they match the context's before execution begins.

member.name: F:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability.None
member.summary: No capabilities — the safest default.

member.name: F:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability.ReadLocalFiles
member.summary: Read files from the local filesystem.

member.name: F:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability.WriteLocalFiles
member.summary: Write or delete files on the local filesystem.

member.name: F:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability.CallExternalApis
member.summary: Make outbound HTTP/API calls.

member.name: F:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability.SendMessages
member.summary: Send messages (email, Slack, webhooks, etc.).

member.name: F:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability.AccessDatabase
member.summary: Query or write to a database.

member.name: F:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability.ReadSecrets
member.summary: Read secrets from environment variables or a secrets vault.

member.name: F:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability.SpawnSubAgents
member.summary: Spawn child agents (sub-agents). Agents without this cannot call other agents.

member.name: F:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability.ReadAuditTrail
member.summary: Access the execution traces and audit logs of other agents in the session.

member.name: F:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability.CallLlm
member.summary: Make calls to a language model API (counts toward quota).

member.name: F:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability.ExecuteCode
member.summary: Execute code (sandboxed or otherwise).

member.name: F:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability.LocalFileSystem
member.summary: Full read/write access to local files.

member.name: F:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability.OutboundNetwork
member.summary: Outbound network (APIs + messaging).

member.name: F:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability.All
member.summary: All capabilities — use only in fully-trusted internal contexts.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapabilityExtensions
member.summary: Extension helpers for .

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapabilityExtensions.Satisfies(MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability,MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability)
member.summary: Returns true if includes all flags in .

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapabilityExtensions.Missing(MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability,MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability)
member.summary: Returns the capabilities in that are missing from .

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapabilityExtensions.ToNames(MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability)
member.summary: Human-readable list of individual capability names.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext
member.summary:
Immutable execution context passed to every agent invocation.
The context carries: - A unique session ID for correlating logs and audit events - The set of capabilities granted to this execution scope - Arbitrary key/value metadata (tenant ID, correlation ID, user identity, etc.) - A cancellation token that propagates timeout and shutdown signals
Contexts are immutable by design. To restrict capabilities for a child agent, call — it always returns a context with fewer or equal permissions, never more.

member.name: P:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext.SessionId
member.summary: Unique identifier for the top-level session (shared across all agents in a run).

member.name: P:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext.GrantedCapabilities
member.summary: The capabilities granted to agents running in this context.

member.name: P:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext.Metadata
member.summary: Read-only view of contextual metadata.

member.name: P:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext.CancellationToken
member.summary: Propagated cancellation token.

member.name: P:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext.CreatedAt
member.summary: When this context was created (UTC).

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext.Create(MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a root context with the specified capabilities.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext.Trusted(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a fully-trusted context. Use only in internal/test scenarios.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext.Sandboxed(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a sandboxed context with no capabilities.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext.HasCapability(MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability)
member.summary: Returns true if this context grants all the specified capabilities.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext.Require(MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability)
member.summary: Verifies that this context grants the required capabilities. Returns a failure with a typed if any capability is missing.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext.Narrow(MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentCapability)
member.summary: Returns a new context that is a strict subset of this one. The result can never grant more capabilities than the current context. This is the correct way to create a child-agent context.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext.WithMetadata(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Returns a new context with an additional metadata entry.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext.GetMetadata``1(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a strongly-typed metadata value, or returns a failure.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.IAgent`2
member.summary:
The fundamental typed contract for all agents in the MonadicSharp.Agents framework.
An agent is a stateless, composable unit of work that: 1. Declares the capabilities it needs () 2. Accepts a strongly-typed input and returns a strongly-typed output 3. Always returns a — never throws for expected failures 4. Receives an for capability verification and correlation
The orchestrator checks against the context's granted capabilities before calling , so agents can assume at runtime that their required capabilities are available.
member.typeparam: The type of data this agent accepts.
The type of data this agent produces on success.

member.name: P:MonadicSharp.Agents.IAgent`2.Name
member.summary: Human-readable name used in traces and audit logs.

member.name: P:MonadicSharp.Agents.IAgent`2.RequiredCapabilities
member.summary: Capabilities this agent needs to function. The orchestrator enforces these before execution.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.IAgent`2.ExecuteAsync(`0,MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the agent's logic. Implementations must NOT throw for expected failures — return instead so the pipeline can handle them gracefully.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.ISyncAgent`2
member.summary: Synchronous variant — prefer the async version for I/O-bound work.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.AgentExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for working with .

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.AgentExtensions.ExecuteAsync``2(MonadicSharp.Agents.ISyncAgent{``0,``1},``0,MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Wraps a synchronous agent to satisfy the async interface.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.Errors.AgentError
member.summary: Typed error factory for all failures that can occur within the MonadicSharp.Agents framework. All errors are plain values — they flow through Result<T> without ever causing unhandled exceptions.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.Orchestration.AgentOrchestrator
member.summary:
Central coordinator for multi-agent systems.
The orchestrator: 1. Maintains a registry of named agents 2. Validates capability requirements before dispatching 3. Wraps agent calls with a per agent 4. Records all dispatches in an immutable 5. Never throws — all errors return as typed values
This is the entry point for building multi-agent workflows where agents need to be discovered by name and coordinated dynamically.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Orchestration.AgentOrchestrator.Register``2(MonadicSharp.Agents.IAgent{``0,``1})
member.summary: Registers an agent under its .

member.name: P:MonadicSharp.Agents.Orchestration.AgentOrchestrator.RegisteredAgents
member.summary: Returns names of all registered agents.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Orchestration.AgentOrchestrator.DispatchAsync``2(System.String,``0,MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Dispatches a call to a named agent. Verifies the agent exists, checks capabilities, applies the circuit breaker, and records the dispatch in the audit log.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Orchestration.AgentOrchestrator.GetCircuitState(System.String)
member.summary: Returns circuit breaker state for a registered agent.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.Orchestration.OrchestratorAuditEntry
member.summary: Immutable record of a single agent dispatch.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Orchestration.OrchestratorAuditEntry.#ctor(System.String,System.Boolean,MonadicSharp.Error,System.String,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Immutable record of a single agent dispatch.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.Orchestration.OrchestratorAuditLog
member.summary: Thread-safe, append-only audit log for the orchestrator.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.Pipeline.AgentPipeline`2
member.summary:
A typed, sequential agent pipeline that threads data from one agent to the next using Railway-Oriented Programming.
Key properties: - Type-safe: TInput and TOutput are enforced at compile time per step - Short-circuits on the first failure — subsequent agents do not run - Checks capabilities before each agent executes - Produces a full even when a step fails
Usage:
var result = await AgentPipeline .Start<string>("DocumentProcessing") .Then(extractorAgent) .Then(summaryAgent) .Then(classifierAgent) .RunAsync(rawText, context);

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Pipeline.AgentPipeline`2.Then``1(MonadicSharp.Agents.IAgent{`1,``0})
member.summary: Chains another agent after this pipeline. The output of this pipeline becomes the input of .

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Pipeline.AgentPipeline`2.RunAsync(`0,MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the pipeline, returning both the result and the full execution trace. The trace is always populated up to the point of failure.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.Pipeline.AgentPipeline
member.summary: Entry point for building typed pipelines.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Pipeline.AgentPipeline.Start``2(System.String,MonadicSharp.Agents.IAgent{``0,``1})
member.summary: Starts a new named pipeline with a single initial agent. The pipeline name appears in all traces and audit logs.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.Pipeline.PipelineStepTrace
member.summary: Immutable record of a single step within a pipeline execution.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.Pipeline.PipelineResult`1
member.summary: The complete result of a pipeline execution: the outcome + full trace. Even on failure, the trace contains all steps up to the error.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.Pipeline.ParallelAgentPipeline`2
member.summary:
Executes multiple agents in parallel over the same input and collects all results.
Two execution modes: - — returns all results (successes and failures) as a collection - — merges successful results; returns failure if ANY agent fails
All agents run concurrently and share the same . Capability checks still apply per agent.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Pipeline.ParallelAgentPipeline`2.RunAllAsync(`0,MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs all agents in parallel. Never short-circuits — always waits for all. Returns both successes and failures.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Pipeline.ParallelAgentPipeline`2.RunAndMergeAsync``1(`0,MonadicSharp.Agents.Core.AgentContext,System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{`1},MonadicSharp.Result{``0}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs all agents in parallel. Returns failure if ANY agent fails. On success, calls to combine all outputs into one.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.Pipeline.AgentOutcome`1
member.summary: Outcome of a single agent in a parallel run.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Pipeline.AgentOutcome`1.#ctor(System.String,MonadicSharp.Result{`0},System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Outcome of a single agent in a parallel run.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.Pipeline.ParallelPipelineResult`1
member.summary: Complete result of a parallel pipeline run.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.Pipeline.ParallelAgentPipeline
member.summary: Static factory for parallel pipelines.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Pipeline.ParallelAgentPipeline.Of``2(System.String,MonadicSharp.Agents.IAgent{``0,``1}[])
member.summary: Creates a parallel pipeline from a set of agents that share input/output types.

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Agents.Resilience.CircuitBreaker
member.summary:
Prevents cascading failures in multi-agent systems by tracking failure rates and temporarily blocking calls when a downstream service is unhealthy.
States: - CLOSED — normal operation; failures are counted - OPEN — blocking all calls; trips after consecutive failures - HALF-OPEN — allows one probe call after ; closes on success, re-opens on failure
All state transitions return — no exceptions leak. Thread-safe via lock-free atomic operations where possible.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Resilience.CircuitBreaker.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.param: Identifier used in error messages and logs.
Consecutive failures before the circuit opens.
How long the circuit stays open before allowing a probe.
Max time a probe call may take before being considered failed.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Resilience.CircuitBreaker.ExecuteAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{MonadicSharp.Result{``0}}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes through the circuit breaker. Returns without calling the operation when the circuit is OPEN.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Agents.Resilience.CircuitBreaker.Reset
member.summary: Manually resets the circuit to CLOSED (useful for tests or operator intervention).
